mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_client_info tci WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY tci.use_yn DESC, tci.clnt_id DESC

SELECT tccm.clnt_id as comp_clnt_id, tci.comp_id as clnt_comp_id, tci.comp_nm, tci.rpst_nm, tci.tel_no, tci.use_yn FROM esg.tb_company_info tci LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_client_map tccm ON tci.comp_id = tccm.comp_id WHERE 1=1 AND tccm.clnt_id = #{searchText} ORDER BY tci.use_yn DESC, tci.ord_seq DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_comp_client_map ( clnt_id, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compClntId}, -- 사업장 ID #{clntCompId}, -- 고객사 ID NOW(), -- 생성 시각 #{createdBy} -- 생성자 ) ON CONFLICT (comp_id, clnt_id) DO NOTHING;
